_comment: SUBTRACTIVE_DITHER_2 RICE_1 (q=8) fixtures from astropy (generate_dither_fixtures.py). decoded_b64 is astropy's decode (float32 LE, row-major within the tile). The TS decodeRiceTile must match to <=1 float32 ULP (astropy's C uses an FMA JS can't repro); NaN mask and exact-zero pixels must match exactly.
